problem_statement: Login fails when the password contains a unicode character.
patch:
diff --git a/src/auth.py b/src/auth.py
--- a/src/auth.py
+++ b/src/auth.py
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ def login(username, password):
-    return check(password)
+    return check(password.encode('utf-8'))

problem_statement: Connection pool leaks connections on error.
patch:
diff --git a/src/db/pool.py b/src/db/pool.py
--- a/src/db/pool.py
+++ b/src/db/pool.py
@@ -20,6 +20,8 @@ class ConnectionPool:
     def acquire(self):
+        if not self._connections:
+            raise PoolEmpty()
         return self._connections.pop()

problem_statement: Two files change in this fix.
patch:
diff --git a/a.py b/a.py
--- a/a.py
+++ b/a.py
@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
-x = 1
+x = 2
diff --git a/pkg/b.py b/pkg/b.py
--- a/pkg/b.py
+++ b/pkg/b.py
@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
-y = 1
+y = 2
